subtitle: Review recovered stories with explicit evidence pressure and confidence gaps before using them downstream.

sections.title: Capability Map and Recovered Stories
sections.label: Recovered Capability
sections.why: Lead with recovered capability areas before individual story detail.

sections.title: Recovered Story Anchors
sections.label: Recovered Story
sections.why: Keep recovered story anchors dense and evidence-oriented.

sections.title: Boundary and Failure Reconciliation
sections.label: Coverage
sections.why: Use a matrix when reviewing recovered edge coverage and missing failure behavior.

sections.title: Low-Confidence Stories and Evidence Gaps
sections.label: Evidence Gap
sections.why: Separate weakly supported stories from strong observed behavior.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State the calls that let downstream artifacts trust recovered stories.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.

glance_cards.label: Decision gates
glance_cards.hint: Approvals that let downstream artifacts trust the set.

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
